Note:

   Reverse Charge mechanism other than that
   paid on through RCM.

2) Taxable, since processing tomatoes to make
   ketchup change essential characteristic's and
   do not qualify for exemption.

3) Importation of Services from non-related
   person without consideration in furtherance
   of business & do not qualify as supply.

4) Training & Performance appraisal service
   provided to Registered person is place of
   supply of service is the location of Registered
   Recipient ie Kerala qualify as Inter-State
   services.

Q1
(b) Computation of value of supply u/s 15

Particulars

i) List price of goods  50,000
ii) Tax levied by municipal  5000
authority
(To all the taxes to be
included while calculating
value of supply except GST)

iii) Packing charge  1000
iv) Subsidy received from
NGO  2000
(Subsidy received from non-
government which is directly
linked to price shall be
included in value)

58,000
(-) Discount offered which
is recorded separately in  (1000)
invoice @2% of 50,000

57,000

Q2.

(a)

1) The place of supply in case of unregistered recipient shall be location of supplier. If unregistered person of address is available in records of supply, if no address not available in case of supply records of supplies then location of supplier. Accordingly, in above case address of our Chartered is recorded which determines place of supply of services. It is New Delhi.

2) Supply do not involve the movement of goods, place of supply is the location of goods at time of delivery to recipient. Here during sale it do not involve movement of goods & it will be sold on as is where it is basis. The place of supply will be the location of machinery at the time of sale is Noida.

Q4 (a)

As per CGST 2017, Under section 7 in accordance with Schedule I activities to be treated as supply, even without consideration.

i) Permanent transfer of business assets or disposal where ITC has been availed.

ii) Supply of goods or services or both between related person or distinct person made in furtherance of business. Further, provided that gift given by employer to employee not exceeding 50,000 do not qualify as goods or service.

iii) Supply of goods,
a) By Principal to agent to make supply on behalf of Principal.
b) By agent to Principal where agent undertake supply receive such goods on behalf of Principal.

iv) Importation of services from related person without consideration in furtherance of business from his establishment.

Q4  
(b) Following person can be register as GST Practitioner.  
i) Any person who is citizen of India, sound mind, not an insolvent not convicted any court.  
ii) Satisfies following conditions -  

1) is a retired officer of commercial tax department of any state.  
2) enrolled as sales Tax Practitioner or tax Return Preparer.  
3) has passed notified examination.  
4) fin passed final exam of ICSI/ ICST/ ICW.
